demo.title: sleuth.sh
demo.code:
# 1. Discover the live endpoints (free, no key)
curl https://app.sleuthagent.ai/x402/openai-bnkr.json

# 2. Call any endpoint with an x402 client (pays per call; chain/token in the 402 response)
#    e.g. run any on-chain investigation from a plain-language question:
x402curl -X POST https://x402.bankr.bot/0x08e82839e1513023d115451babc0ff18eda8f925/run-investigation \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"conversation_id":"<uuid>","query":"Who are the insiders of $VIRTUAL?"}'

setup: No install required — every endpoint is plain HTTP behind x402 (no account; chain/token advertised in the 402 response)
Python: `pip install x402` — TypeScript: `npm install x402-axios`
Fund a wallet on the endpoint's payment chain (today Base/USDC; read the 402 response to confirm)
Discover live endpoints: GET https://app.sleuthagent.ai/x402/openai-bnkr.json (free, no key)
